text:
/ci1 1 こないなところでデカブツか！
無視してねーちゃん追ってもいいし
別に、倒してしまっても構わんで！

/ci1 1 Well, well! Talk about a super-sized
chance encounter! You can ignore it and pursue
the lady. Or take it out, I guess. Your choice!
